scripts.predev: node -e "const v=+process.version.slice(1).split('.')[0]; if(v<18){console.error('\nNode 18+ required for Vite 5 (you have '+process.version+'). Try: nvm use\n'); process.exit(1)}"
scripts.prebuild: node -e "const v=+process.version.slice(1).split('.')[0]; if(v<18){console.error('\nNode 18+ required (you have '+process.version+'). Try: nvm use\n'); process.exit(1)}"
